name: Security report

# Stop.

Do not open a public security issue.

Please report security vulnerabilities through GitHub Security Advisories:

https://github.com/manop55555/abcpwn/security/advisories/new

There is no email contact for security issues. Use the link above.

If you have already opened this issue by mistake, close it immediately and
re-file through the advisories link.
